text:
RIFs include ACOs that participated for the: (1) 12-month performance year from January 1, 2019, through December 31, 2019 and (2) the 6-month performance year from January 1, 2019, through June 30, 2019.
Although some ACOs are participating in a 6-month performance year, all calculations are based off of 12 months of data.
3Information on beneficiaries assigned to ACOs participating in PY 2019-A, a 6-month performance year from July 1, 2019 through December 31, 2019, can be found in separate
